case_title: LINDA MAC SCHOEPPE VS. STEPHANIE BELL ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 62942204) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAC SCHOEPPE, LINDA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-27-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAC SCHOEPPE, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, STEPHANIE DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-13-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-13-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-22-2019
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-13-2019 CONTINUED TO MAR-27-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND FEES. THE COURT SHALL RETAIN JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 664.6.(TRANSACTION ID # 62942204) (TRANSACTION ID # 62942204)
